name: Turkey-Spinach Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen Chopped Spinach, drained well
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet until crisp; remove the bacon, reserving 2 tablespoons drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
3. Saute onion in the bacon drippings until tender.
4. Add rice, spinach, water chestnuts, half of the crumbled bacon, and salt; stir well.
5. Combine soup and sour cream; mix half of the soup mixture into the spinach mixture.
6. Spoon the spinach mixture into a lightly greased 12x7-inch baking dish.
7. Arrange turkey slices on top of the spinach mixture.
8. Spoon the remaining soup mixture over the turkey.
9. Combine breadcrumbs and butter; mix well, then sprinkle around the edges of the casserole.
10. Sprinkle the remaining bacon over the center of the casserole.
11. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. Yield: 6 servings.
